venture.thesis: Upline helps independent insurance agencies retain and grow household relationships by proactively reviewing coverage at renewal — surfacing savings, cross-sell opportunities, and carrier shopping when it actually pays off.
venture.mantra: Right recommendation, right time, right carrier — without the manual grind.
venture.upcomingProofPoint: Week 1 pilot board: 15 households with tiered outreach (optimize-in-place under 10%, shop at 10%+) and live questionnaires — proving the renewal-review workflow end to end with Members 1st.
